note: Approved quick-win snapshot with Koblenz Altstadt exact-object rollback for 3 POIs; schaengelbrunnen intentionally excluded pending verifiable OSM exact-object point.

proposals.proposalReason: Medium consensus for a location target with google_places and supporting secondary source.
proposals.manualCheckHint: confirm museum entrance instead of area center
proposals.patchText: Update ludwig-museum-koblenz from 50.3626, 7.6059 to 50.3627774, 7.605001699999999 using google_places; fallback osm_nominatim; delta ~67 m; confirm museum entrance instead of area center

proposals.proposalReason: Medium consensus for a point-like target with google_places and supporting secondary source.
proposals.manualCheckHint: prefer named building over surrounding street point
proposals.patchText: Update basilika-st-kastor from 50.36268, 7.605 to 50.362227399999995, 7.6044446 using google_places; fallback osm_nominatim; delta ~64 m; prefer named building over surrounding street point

proposals.proposalReason: Exact OSM object rollback: approved quick-win drifted away from the Florinskirche OSM object point.
